---
pagetitle: "Contact | Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Contact

I welcome opportunities to connect around conservation physiology, wildlife medicine and disease ecology, reproductive biology, One Health, environmental health, Puerto Rican island science, student mentoring, and community-based conservation.
:::

::: {.section-block}

## Connect by pathway

::: {.gateway-grid}

::: {.gateway-card}
### Research collaboration

Wildlife disease ecology, One Health, conservation physiology, environmental surveillance, and reproducible research.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Student mentorship

Fieldwork, laboratory exposure, R/GitHub workflows, scientific writing, and academic development.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Outreach

WildCiencia, community-based conservation, student training, and public science communication.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Future platforms

Project websites, educational resources, reproducible repositories, WildCiencia, and future shop/outreach systems.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-block}

## Contact information

**Email:** [your-email-here@example.com](mailto:your-email-here@example.com)

Replace the placeholder email with your preferred professional email.

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Professional links

::: {.link-grid}

[GitHub](https://github.com/ajfigueroaruiz)

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN-USERNAME/)

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/YOUR-ORCID-ID)

[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/YOUR-RESEARCHGATE-NAME)

[protocols.io](https://www.protocols.io/researchers/YOUR-PROTOCOLS-IO-PROFILE)

:::
:::
